title: Flame Mace
description: A powerful fire themed mace weapon with passive fire resistance, regeneration in lava, and three ultimate abilities including air dash fire ring on hit and unstoppable lava damage.
body:
# Inferno Sovereign – Fire Mace

The Inferno Sovereign is a top-level fire-themed mace built for players who prefer aggressive, close-range combat and strong elemental control. This weapon is not just about high damage; it changes how the player interacts with fire-based environments and intense battles.

When equipped, the mace grants passive fire resistance, reducing damage taken from fire, lava, and burn effects. In addition, the wielder regenerates health while standing in lava or molten areas, turning normally dangerous terrain into a safe and strategic zone. This makes the weapon especially powerful in volcanic or nether-like regions.

The Inferno Sovereign also includes three ultimate abilities that define its combat style. The first ability is an air dash, allowing the player to dash forward in mid-air. This helps in closing gaps, dodging attacks, or escaping risky situations, giving the heavy mace surprising mobility.

The second ability activates on hit, creating a ring of fire around the target. This ring damages nearby enemies, making the weapon effective against groups and punishing enemies that stay too close.

The final ultimate ability unleashes unstoppable lava damage. This attack ignores armor, shields, and resistance, ensuring reliable damage against even the strongest opponents. Once activated, the damage cannot be blocked or reduced.

Overall, the Inferno Sovereign is designed for end-game gameplay, rewarding bold and aggressive players with strong survivability, crowd control, mobility, and guaranteed damage.
